title: Dicely
description: Dice to your heart’s content, any size, any amount, all from one command.
body:
# Dicely

**Dicely** is a simple command based dice mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric).  
With dicely, you can roll any dice in any amount you want, completely client sided. 

---

## Commands

The mod supports two equivalent commands: `/dicely` and `/roll`

### Main Commands

- `/dicely <sides> [count]` or `/roll <sides> [count]` - Rolls dice with the specified number of sides
  - `<sides>`: Number of sides on the dice (required)
  - `[count]`: Number of dice to roll (optional, defaults to 1)

### Subcommands (only available with `/dicely`)

- `/dicely history` - Shows your last rolls
- `/dicely copy` - Copies the last roll to clipboard

---

## Dependencies

- Minecraft **1.20.1, 1.21.8, 1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader **≥ 0.18.4**
- Fabric API:
  - For Minecraft 1.20.1: **0.92.6+1.20.1**
  - For Minecraft 1.21.8: **0.136.1+1.21.8**
  - For Minecraft 1.21.11: **0.141.1+1.21.11**

---

## Early Development Disclaimer

Dicely is still in its early stages, so you may encounter the occasional bug or jank.  
Feedback and suggestions are always welcome!
